name: @allmaps/render-wasm
description: WebAssembly-powered renderer for high-performance image transformations

scripts.build: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128' PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg && cp src/wasm.d.ts pkg/
scripts.build:nodejs: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+simd128' PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-nodejs
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:nodejs
